steps.title: Use distance as x and time as y
steps.content: The choices are all equations for $t$ in terms of $d$, so graph distance $d$ on the $x$-axis and time $t$ on the $y$-axis. The table gives the points $(0.32,8)$ and $(0.56,14)$.

steps.title: Run a proportional calculation
steps.content: Because zero distance should take zero time, use the proportional model $t=kd$. Find $k$ from either table row: $$k=\frac{8}{0.32}=25.$$ So the model is $t=25d$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: C, $t=25d$, is the only choice with this slope. It also checks in the table because $25(0.56)=14$.
